---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="resume-page">

  <!-- Headshot + Name -->
  <div class="resume-identity">
    <img src="../assets/Merna.png" alt="Merna S. Saad" class="resume-headshot" />
    <div class="resume-identity-text">
      <h1 class="resume-name">Merna S. Saad</h1>
      <div class="resume-tagline">MSBA candidate, UCSD Rady</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Contact -->
  <div class="resume-contact">
    <span>San Diego, CA</span>
    <span class="resume-sep"></span>
    <span><a href="mailto:msaad@ucsd.edu">msaad@ucsd.edu</a></span>
    <span class="resume-sep"></span>
    <span><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/merna-s-saad" target="_blank" rel="noopener">linkedin.com/in/merna-s-saad</a></span>
  </div>
  <div class="resume-visa">U.S. Permanent Resident, No Sponsorship Required</div>

  <!-- Action Buttons -->
  <div class="resume-actions">
    <a href="mailto:msaad@ucsd.edu" class="resume-action-btn">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/>
        <path d="M22 7l-10 7L2 7"/>
      </svg>
      <span>Email</span>
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/merna-s-saad" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resume-action-btn">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="3"/>
        <path d="M8 11v5M8 8v.01M12 16v-5c0-1.5 1-2 2-2s2 .5 2 2v5"/>
      </svg>
      <span>LinkedIn</span>
    </a>
    <a href="https://github.com/merna-saad" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="resume-action-btn">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 00-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0020 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0019.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 00-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 005 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 00-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 009 18.13V22"/>
      </svg>
      <span>GitHub</span>
    </a>
    <a href="../assets/Resume.pdf" download class="resume-action-btn">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-4M7 10l5 5 5-5M12 15V3"/>
      </svg>
      <span>Download PDF</span>
    </a>
  </div>

  <hr class="resume-rule" />

  <!-- Education -->
  <section class="resume-section resume-anim" style="animation-delay: 0ms;">
    <div class="resume-section-label">01 / Education</div>
    <h2 class="resume-section-title">Education</h2>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">Master of Science in Business Analytics, <span class="resume-entry-org">Rady School of Management</span></div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">06/2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-entry-sub">University of California, San Diego, CA | GPA: 3.95</div>
      <ul class="resume-bullets">
        <li>Relevant Courses: Business Analytics, Predictive Analytics, Customer Analytics, Supervised Machine Learning, Web Mining &amp; Recommender Systems, Data Engineering</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">Bachelor of Science, Architectural Engineering</div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">01/2014</div>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-entry-sub">The American University in Cairo, Cairo, Egypt</div>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">Bachelor of Business Administration, Finance</div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">01/2014</div>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-entry-sub">The American University in Cairo, Cairo, Egypt</div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Experience -->
  <section class="resume-section resume-anim" style="animation-delay: 50ms;">
    <div class="resume-section-label">02 / Experience</div>
    <h2 class="resume-section-title">Experience</h2>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">Senior Vice President, <span class="resume-entry-org">Strategic Venture Manager, Bank of Egypt, Cairo, Egypt</span></div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">03/2020 - 06/2023</div>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-entry-sub"><em>Egypt's second-largest national bank with over 700 branches serving 10+ million customers</em></div>
      <ul class="resume-bullets">
        <li>Coordinated strategic analytics with McKinsey &amp; BCG analyzing 15+ sectors using regression models and macroeconomic indicators, identifying $100B export potential (20% of industrial GDP); presented insights to cabinet ministers</li>
        <li>Built predictive panel regression models in Python (Pandas, statsmodels, scikit-learn) to isolate impact of currency fluctuations on export volumes, achieving 12% efficiency improvement</li>
        <li>Engineered interactive dashboards using Tableau and Plotly to visualize real-time sectoral performance metrics across 15+ sectors</li>
        <li>Served on IMO leadership committee during acquisition of Egypt's second-largest investment bank, coordinating data-driven integration strategies</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">Manager, <span class="resume-entry-org">Corporate and Credit, Corplease S.A.E, Cairo, Egypt</span></div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">07/2018 - 03/2020</div>
      </div>
      <div class="resume-entry-sub"><em>Egypt's largest financial leasing company with approximately 20% market share</em></div>
      <ul class="resume-bullets">
        <li>Developed credit risk models using logistic regression and decision trees analyzing debt-to-income ratios, repayment behavior, and macroeconomic indicators to reduce default rates</li>
        <li>Built automated ETL pipelines using Python and Excel VBA to streamline credit evaluation for 250+ clients, reducing assessment time by 40%</li>
        <li>Created executive dashboards tracking portfolio health, risk scores, and lending performance using SQL</li>
        <li>Supervised team of 6 analysts to achieve $20M annual lending target while maintaining portfolio quality</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">Senior Officer, <span class="resume-entry-org">Corporate and Credit, Corplease S.A.E, Cairo, Egypt</span></div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">07/2016 - 07/2018</div>
      </div>
      <ul class="resume-bullets">
        <li>Managed portfolio of 30 corporations, leveraging statistical analysis and segmentation to identify cross-selling opportunities, achieving 4% revenue growth</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">Officer, <span class="resume-entry-org">Corporate and Credit, Corplease S.A.E, Cairo, Egypt</span></div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">07/2014 - 07/2016</div>
      </div>
      <ul class="resume-bullets">
        <li>Conducted market research and competitive analysis using data collection and statistical techniques to identify trends in the leasing sector</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Academic Projects -->
  <section class="resume-section resume-anim" style="animation-delay: 100ms;">
    <div class="resume-section-label">03 / Academic Projects</div>
    <h2 class="resume-section-title">Academic Projects</h2>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">Marketing Campaign Response Prediction, <span class="resume-entry-org">UCSD Rady</span></div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">Winter 2026</div>
      </div>
      <ul class="resume-bullets">
        <li>Built ML models to predict campaign response using logistic regression with interactions, random forest, and XGBoost; performed feature engineering, hyperparameter tuning, and model comparison</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">FIFA 2026 World Cup Winner Prediction, <span class="resume-entry-org">UCSD Rady</span></div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">Fall 2025</div>
      </div>
      <ul class="resume-bullets">
        <li>Developed predictive models using historical match data, team rankings, and player statistics; applied classification and ensemble methods with cross-validation</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="resume-entry-header">
        <div class="resume-entry-title">Web Mining &amp; Recommender Systems, <span class="resume-entry-org">UCSD Rady</span></div>
        <div class="resume-entry-date">Fall 2025</div>
      </div>
      <ul class="resume-bullets">
        <li>Built collaborative filtering and content-based recommender systems; applied web mining to extract insights from unstructured data</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Specialized Skills -->
  <section class="resume-section resume-anim" style="animation-delay: 150ms;">
    <div class="resume-section-label">04 / Specialized Skills</div>
    <h2 class="resume-section-title">Specialized Skills</h2>

    <ul class="resume-bullets resume-skills-list">
      <li><strong>Languages &amp; Libraries:</strong> Python (Pandas, NumPy, Polars, scikit-learn, statsmodels, Matplotlib, Seaborn, plotnine), SQL, Excel VBA, Git</li>
      <li><strong>ML &amp; Statistics:</strong> Regression (Linear, Logistic, Lasso, Ridge), Classification, Clustering, Random Forest, XGBoost, NLP, Recommender Systems, A/B Testing, Time Series, Feature Engineering</li>
      <li><strong>Tools:</strong> Jupyter, Tableau, Plotly, ETL Pipelines</li>
      <li><strong>Business:</strong> Strategic Planning, Project Management, Stakeholder Management, Financial Analysis</li>
      <li><strong>Certifications:</strong> Stanford ML, UPenn Python &amp; Statistics, Imperial College Math for ML, UC Davis SQL, UCSD Probability</li>
      <li><strong>Relevant Courses:</strong> Business Analytics, Predictive Analytics, Customer Analytics, Supervised Machine Learning, Web Mining &amp; Recommender Systems, Data Engineering</li>
    </ul>
  </section>

</div>
```
